title: Week of March 30, 2026
summary: This week focused on improving system reliability and fixing issues that were preventing smooth operations. We enhanced data import resilience, fixed display consistency issues across plugins, and resolved several Salesforce deployment problems. Most importantly, we restored missing functionality in HubSpot that was blocking automation launches and improved error recovery for Salesforce deployments.

entries.headline: Enhanced data import reliability and workflow enrichment
Salesforce deployments now recover better from errors
Plugin names now display consistently across the platform
Headlines now format properly in all views
Restored missing historical data from previous weeks
Better Salesforce field validation and deployment permissions
details: Now detects State/Country picklist configuration issues
Improved validation checks before deploying changes
Enhanced retry logic for failed operations

entries.headline: Complex Salesforce deployments now run more reliably
Restored HubSpot automation launches after system failure
Resolved Salesforce validation errors during data queries
